# Little Wise Kids

> Quality childcare and bilingual early years education in Easton, Bristol.

## Core Pages & Resources (HTML)
- [Home Page](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/): Overview of Little Wise Kids childcare.
- [About Us](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/about-us): Learn about our ethos, team, and approach to childcare.
- [Parents Information](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/parents-information): Details on settling in, policies, and what children need.
- [Hours & Nutrition](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/hours-nutrition): Operating hours, daily routines, and healthy meal options.
- [Multilingual Learning](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/multilingual-learning): Information on our English & Portuguese language learning programs.
- [Our Gallery](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/our-gallery): Photo gallery of our indoor and outdoor facilities.
- [Contact Us](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/contact): Get in touch to schedule a visit or ask questions.

## Core Pages & Resources (Markdown)
- [Home Page (Markdown)](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/index.md)
- [About Us (Markdown)](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/about-us.md)
- [Parents Information (Markdown)](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/parents-information.md)
- [Hours & Nutrition (Markdown)](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/hours-nutrition.md)
- [Multilingual Learning (Markdown)](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/multilingual-learning.md)
- [Our Gallery (Markdown)](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/our-gallery.md)
- [Contact Us (Markdown)](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/contact.md)

## Core Pages & Resources (Plain Text Versions)
- [Home Page (Plain Text)](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/index.txt)
- [About Us (Plain Text)](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/about-us.txt)
- [Parents Information (Plain Text)](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/parents-information.txt)
- [Hours & Nutrition (Plain Text)](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/hours-nutrition.txt)
- [Multilingual Learning (Plain Text)](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/multilingual-learning.txt)
- [Our Gallery (Plain Text)](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/our-gallery.txt)
- [Contact Us (Plain Text)](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/contact.txt)

## Agent Resources & API Discovery
- [API Catalog](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/.well-known/api-catalog): Automated API discovery catalog.
- [MCP Server Card](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json): Model Context Protocol server configuration.
- [Agent Skills](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json): Index of supported agent skills.
- [Agent Auth Info](https://littlewisekids.co.uk/auth.md): Authentication and registration guidelines.
